steps.title: Identify what counts as a concrete example of a nickname
steps.content: An example must name the specific nickname itself. The notes contain exactly one named nickname: Scotty.

steps.title: Select the choice that names the nickname
steps.content:
Choice C explicitly provides the nickname by name—Scotty—and identifies what it's the nickname of.

Choices A, B, and D either omit the nickname name entirely or discuss nicknames generally without providing the specific example the task demands.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
